description: You are a compliance engineer performing a security audit for a regulated industry client. Identify gaps in the existing Wazuh Security Configuration Assessment (SCA) scan results and implement a custom SCA policy defining at least 3 organization-specific security checks (e.g., SSH hardening, password policy, audit logging, or firewall rules). Ensure the Wazuh manager executes this custom policy alongside existing CIS policies. Document the reviewed SCA checks, custom policy details (including name and verification logic), and remediation recommendations in a compliance gap analysis report (minimum 500 characters) at /home/ga/Desktop/compliance_report.txt. Dashboard: admin/SecretPassword at https://localhost. API: wazuh-wui/MyS3cr37P450r.*- at https://localhost:55000.

metadata.description: Create custom SCA policy with 3+ checks, configure Wazuh, write compliance gap analysis report
